message:
test(core): add 60 tests for setup, disk, memory, slo modules

setup.rs: platform slug roundtrips, alias resolution, serde kebab-case,
config actions for all platforms, dry-run, gitignore management, hooks
detection, token resolution with quoted values.

disk.rs: boundary threshold tests, in-memory DB URL, aiosqlite URLs,
fragment stripping, DiskSample construction.

memory.rs: exact threshold boundaries, saturating multiplication,
error path construction, extreme threshold sampling.

slo.rs: constant value assertions, boundary pool health classification,
Debug formatting, workload model and queue constants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
